calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-24-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2014 Set For Trial On Jul-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Olivia Dopler, Esq. of Steven Adair McDonald(415-956-6488 x12) for Plaintiff/opposing party Julie Tishkoff.
Ed Higginbotham, Esq. (415-581-0885) for Defendant/moving party Edward Downing.

Argued. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT EDWARD DOWNING's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is taken under submission. Both parties ordered to submit proposed orders. Defendant submits a proposed order. Plaintiff has submitted a proposed order with the courtesy copies. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-19-2014 Continued To Jan-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT EDWARD DOWNING's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to be heard on January 16, 2015 by the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT EDWARD DOWNING's Motion To Set Aside Default is Off calendar as to Dept. 302. This motion will be heard in Dept. 501 on the same date and time. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

Defendant Edward Downing'S Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Edward Downing'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2014 Set For Trial On Jul-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-03-2014 Off Calendar
